name: Durable Execution Lease
description: Durable execution as a payable resource — a fly.io-lite/cloudflare-lite provider that leases durable container execution to agents: a metered (StandingObligation per-period) + paid (Payable Transfer) lease over a committed umem cell-heap checkpoint (the durable, passable, witnessed execution image), lapsing on non-payment.

heap_collections.EXEC_COLL: 0x0000E3EC — the durable execution image (umem cell-heap checkpoint): KEY_STEP, KEY_DIGEST, plus working-memory keys >= 16

deos.mount: register_deos (src/lib.rs) — folds the composed DeosApp into the StarbridgeAppContext affordance registry

affordances.advance: GATED (cap∧state), Signature — not-lapsed precondition (LAPSED_SLOT == 0); the fire submits the cursor-advancing turn (reading the LIVE STEP_SLOT + 1), the executor re-enforcing Monotonic(STEP_SLOT), then mirrors the committed umem heap image + working memory
affordances.pay: cap-only, Signature (the agent pays one period's rent — a conserving Transfer through Payable)
affordances.lapse: cap-only, root (the provider reclaims a delinquent slot)

deos.seam: PARTIAL — the PAYMENT (a conserving Transfer) and the durable-cursor forward-only tooth (Monotonic(STEP_SLOT)) are REAL verified turns; the METER advance (the StandingObligation discharge) and the heap-checkpoint mirror are executor-side ledger steps (the named DischargeObligation in-circuit seam StandingObligation describes). This is a MODEL of a durable-execution provider on the dregg value layer, not a real container runtime.
